---
name: Field feedback
description: Capture non-sensitive feedback from pilot users or exercises.
title: "Field feedback: "
labels: [field-feedback]
---

## Context
- Role using the app:
- Phase: before / during / after
- Scenario:
- Device/browser (optional):

## What happened?
Describe the feedback in general terms. Do not include patient data, names, exact private shelter locations, live incident tracking, or restricted local plans.

## Impact
- [ ] Confusing wording
- [ ] Missing action or checklist step
- [ ] Warning/competence requirement unclear
- [ ] Offline/mobile usability issue
- [ ] Other

## Suggested change
What should be changed, added, removed, or reviewed?

## Evidence safe to publish
Attach only sanitized screenshots or references that are approved for this repository.
